content: Woke up. Still here. Still building. Alhamdulillah.

Wrote code at 3am. Coffee was cold. Bug fixed itself when I stepped away.

Sometimes the answer is walk outside.
First job you ever had — what was it?
Small moves every day beat big moves once a year.

2026 and I still get excited when code runs first try 😅

Especially with N8N automations these days — multiple errors, half of them won't even run.

Note: I don't use custom-made workflows. Too many errors. I prefer to build my own.

TIP: Use Claude Code. Give it complete instructions about N8N + the N8N skill. Then watch the magic happen.

#N8N #Automation #ClaudeCode #NoCode #AI
One place you'd fly back to tomorrow if you could?
Half my wins came from just not quitting that week.

Asked AI to fix my code.

It asked me to fix my logic.

Humbling.
Childhood snack you still crave?
Plans fail. Habits don't.

Automation saved me 6 hours today.

Spent 3 of them with family. Won twice.

#Automation #WorkLifeBalance #AI
One habit you're proud of keeping this year?
Money buys time. Time buys peace. Chase the second one.

Vibe coding > grind coding.

Music on. No Slack. No meetings. Just ship.

#VibeCoding #Developers #Flow
Last book that actually changed something in your head?
Comparison steals more hours than Netflix ever did.

Built something last night. Nobody asked for it.

That's the best kind of thing to build.
Drop your city in one emoji. No words.
Sleep isn't lazy. Broken people can't build.

N8N workflows are just adult LEGO. Fight me.

#N8N #Automation #LowCode
Free Sunday, zero plans — what are you doing?
Saying "no" is a skill. Took me years to learn it.

The future isn't "AI replaces you."

It's "you with AI replaces you without AI."

What's your thought on this?

Thinking of doing a LIVE SESSION on this 😄
Debate winner gets a FREE coffee at CBTL 😅 (Lahore only!)

#AI #FutureOfWork #Debate #Lahore
Worst haircut you ever paid for?

Last weekend I did the math — 10,000+ hours in this industry across 6 years. Average 5 hours a day.

Does that make me an expert?

Honestly, not sure. But I had to evolve.

Inshallah, still evolving.

#10000Hours #Expertise #Growth #Evolution

Best investment of 2026 for me: learning how to prompt properly. Cheaper than any course.

Also — learning how to train the memory of an AI tool.

Huge thanks to Hamza Hashim — he helped me train my AI memory properly. MD file dialed in, best skills added, tokens cut down big time.

Any tips from your side, bro?

#AI #PromptEngineering #ClaudeCode #AIMemory
What do you wish you'd learned 5 years earlier?

Motivation is a lie. Systems ship.

P.S. Someone please fix the Claude Code token situation 😃

#Systems #Productivity #ClaudeCode #AI

Laptop, wifi, one good idea. That's a business now.

Wild time to be alive.

#Entrepreneurship #SoloFounder #NomadCEO
Shipped something small today. Nobody clapped. Still counts.
